queries.question: Empirical analysis of the statistical impact of loan duration in months on credit default probability and its classification as a key determinant of elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Investigation into the role of lacking a checking account as a significant credit risk driver contributing to increased default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating effect of maintaining a negative checking account balance on credit default probability and its function as a protective determinant in credit risk assessment.
